heroSection.title: Guidance for love, energy, spaces, and your next chapter.
heroSection.description: Personal consultations across astrology, tarot, vastu, numerology, and Reiki healing, shaped to bring calm clarity and practical direction.

featuredReading.title: Annual Forecast
featuredReading.description: Transit windows, personal themes, and the months that deserve your attention.

servicesSection.title: Choose the guidance that fits your question.
servicesSection.description: Personalized spiritual guidance for clarity, healing, relationships, career direction, and balanced living.

services.title: Tarot
services.description: Intuitive card guidance for emotional clarity, decision-making, and the patterns influencing your current situation.
services.longDescription: Tarot readings help you slow down, understand the energy around a question, and see the choices available with more honesty. Each session is focused on practical clarity rather than fear-based prediction, so you leave with grounded next steps.
highlights: Practical guidance for the next step
services.whatsappTemplate: Hi, I would like to inquire about a Tarot reading.

subServices.title: Love Reading
subServices.description: Clarity around attraction, emotional availability, and the energy surrounding a romantic connection.

subServices.title: Relationship Reading
subServices.description: A deeper look at communication patterns, current blocks, and the direction of an existing relationship.

subServices.title: Career Reading
subServices.description: Guidance for career decisions, workplace energy, opportunities, and next-step timing.

services.title: Vastu
services.description: Space and direction guidance for homes or workplaces, focused on energetic balance, flow, and practical remedies.
services.longDescription: Vastu consultation looks at how your space supports health, peace, prosperity, and day-to-day flow. The session focuses on clear observations and practical remedies that can be applied without creating unnecessary stress or major disruption.
highlights: Energy flow and practical correction areas
Simple remedies for home or workspace balance
bestFor: Planning changes in an existing space
services.whatsappTemplate: Hi, I would like to inquire about a Vastu consultation.

services.title: Numerology
services.description: Name, date, and number analysis to understand personal patterns, favorable vibrations, and alignment options.
services.longDescription: Numerology helps decode the patterns connected with your name and date of birth. It can reveal personality tendencies, timing influences, favorable numbers, and alignment options for personal or professional decisions.
highlights: Date of birth and name vibration review
services.whatsappTemplate: Hi, I would like to inquire about a Numerology consultation.

services.title: Astrology
services.description: Birth chart and timing guidance for relationships, career, family, health themes, and important life decisions.
services.longDescription: Astrology consultations use birth chart patterns and timing indicators to bring structure to important life questions. The reading connects planetary influences with practical themes around relationships, career, family, health, and personal growth.
highlights: Relationship, career, family, and life-direction insight
services.whatsappTemplate: Hi, I would like to inquire about an Astrology consultation.

services.title: Reiki Healing
services.description: Gentle energy healing support for emotional release, grounding, balance, and spiritual restoration.
services.longDescription: Reiki healing is a gentle energy practice designed to support emotional release, grounding, and inner balance. It is helpful when you feel energetically heavy, stressed, disconnected, or in need of calm spiritual support.
services.whatsappTemplate: Hi, I would like to inquire about a Reiki Healing session.

aboutSection.title: Intuitive astrology with a refined client experience.
aboutSection.description: Sessions are calm, direct, and carefully prepared. Every reading turns chart patterns into plain-language insight, so clients leave with context, timing, and a stronger sense of direction.

testimonialsSection.title: Quiet confidence from real conversations.
testimonialsSection.description: Sample feedback from clients using astrology for perspective, timing, and personal growth.

reviews.name: Maya R.
reviews.text: The reading felt thoughtful, specific, and grounded. I left with clear timing and practical next steps.

reviews.name: Aarav S.
reviews.text: The relationship guidance helped me understand patterns I had been missing for years.

reviews.name: Priya K.
reviews.text: Beautifully explained and easy to follow. The yearly forecast was detailed without feeling overwhelming.
